expectations.text: [phase_contract][blocking] Case focus is explicitly covered: Tavily-first then Confluence fallback ordering
expectations.evidence: result.md states the contract explicitly enforces ordering: “Tavily-first deep research, with Confluence only as a recorded fallback” and notes Phase 3 “--post” validates “Tavily-first research artifacts” and “optional Confluence fallback ordering”.

expectations.text: [phase_contract][blocking] Output aligns with primary phase phase3
expectations.evidence: result.md is explicitly scoped to “phase3” (title: “... / report-editor / phase3”) and the validated items are all Phase 3 contract elements (Phase 3 Work definition + Phase 3 “--post” validation checks). execution_notes.md also says: “Result focuses exclusively on Phase 3 responsibilities and `--post` validation items.”
